}) }}

parameters.content:
## 1. ENTRY & VALIDATION
Webhook receives inbound SMS/call from GHL.
Validates payload, normalizes contact_id, logs to queue, routes missed calls vs SMS.

## 2. MISSED CALL BRANCH
30-min cooldown per contact. Auto-replies with contextual missed call text.
Alerts on SMS send failure.

## 3. QUEUE & DEDUPLICATION
45-240s random delay for human-like response timing.
Coalesces multiple messages from same contact into single processing run.

## 4. INJECTION DETECTION
Detects prompt injection and AI disclosure attempts.
Hardcoded deflection responses bypass Claude entirely.

## 5. CONTACT GATES
Fetches live GHL contact. Blocks DEAD leads and Human Takeover contacts.
Both stop paths clear the message queue.

## 6. PARALLEL DATA FETCH
5 parallel branches: GHL conversation + messages, opportunity, Supabase history, calendar availability, contact notes.
Merge Context gates until all branches complete.

## 7. CLAUDE AI PROCESSING
Two Claude calls: (1) Generate seller SMS response via forced tool_use. (2) Score lead and assign status.
Validation gate blocks garbage responses from reaching sellers.

## 8. ROUTING & DISPATCH
Process and Route: fixed response overrides, pipeline routing, temperature scoring, CONTRACT_READY detection.
Send SMS with failure alerting. Update GHL fields, Supabase, opportunity.

## 9. CALENDAR
Create, update, or cancel Google Calendar events for scheduled calls.
Alerts on calendar creation failure.

## 10. LEAD ALERTS & ESCALATION
Hot Lead (temp>=76, turns>=2): tag + Supabase flag + GHL task.
Call Now: tag + HT field + critical alert task.
Contract Ready: tag + HT field + Supabase flag.
